content: Nonostante Trang continui a dire di amarlo, Spenser non può fare a meno di aver paura che lei smetta di volergli bene.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by riccioberto (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:Even though Trang continued to say that she loved him, Spenser couldn't do anything but fear that she would stop caring
